reviews.comment:
Llena la playa pero habían varios playeros. El baño horrible re sucio pero es la gente q no cuida nada.

(Translated by Google)
The beach was crowded, but there were several beachgoers. The bathroom was horribly dirty, but that's because people don't take care of anything.

Route 40, it goes by quickly, fuel, some cookies and keep going..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very attentive!

reviews.comment:
Tiene muchos surtidores y playeros, así que te atienden rápido. Tiene un amplio surtido para comer, tiene agua caliente para el mate. Tiene mucho lugar para parar y bastante sombra también. Me gusta mucho!

(Translated by Google)
It has plenty of gas pumps and attendants, so you get served quickly. It has a wide variety of food, and hot water for mate. There's plenty of space to stop and lots of shade too. I really like it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcU5pTVF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Una de las estaciones de servicio con más actividad del país,  lugar tradicional en el acceso a la ciudad, donde los empleados son muy buena referencia para los turistas. Excelente comida y servicios.

(Translated by Google)
One of the busiest gas stations in the country, a traditional spot at the entrance to the city, where the staff are highly recommended by tourists. Excellent food and service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXeUpyZHlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para permanecer un rato, lugar con sombra, buena limpieza de baños  Casi siempre hay que hacer fila para a cargar combustible,  en cualquier estación del año.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stay for a while, shady spot, clean bathrooms. You almost always have to wait in line to fill up with gas, no matter the season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXc0l5TnVRRRAB
